summary: The test suite provides comprehensive unit testing of core functionality (classification, grouping, sorting, JSON/markdown formatting) and includes real end-to-end workflow validation via act. Organization is clean with parameterized test cases. However, critical gaps undermine confidence: (1) The -FailOn parameter is never explicitly tested—no validation that expired/warning/none modes produce correct exit codes. (2) CLI exit code behavior is untested at the script level; the workflow harness expects exit 0 for the 'baseline' case despite it containing 2 expired secrets, suggesting either incorrect fixture expectations or missing workflow parameter configuration. (3) Input validation is incomplete—no tests for invalid date formats, non-numeric rotationDays, zero/negative rotation policies, or future-dated secrets. (4) The end-to-end tests via act verify the workflow runs but don't validate the actual JSON or markdown content beyond structural delimiters. While the test suite would catch regressions in the happy path (classification logic, grouping, sorting) and some error handling, the exit code logic gap and parameter coverage holes suggest it would miss bugs in CLI behavior.
